MANOSABA_LIN_EVENT_GUARD_ONE_EVENT.title: Guard's Trial
MANOSABA_LIN_EVENT_GUARD_ONE_EVENT.pages: By the campfire, you encounter a mysterious guard. He offers two trials:
Gain 13 max HP, upgrade a card, but the Boss will be replaced by a Guard
You accepted the Power Trial. Max HP increased, card upgraded. But the Boss ahead has been replaced...
You accepted the Healing Trial. HP restored, card upgraded.
